portfolioSummary.totalGainTooltip: The total profit or loss across all your investments: Portfolio Value minus Net Invested. Includes realised gains, unrealised gains, dividends, and interest.
portfolioSummary.gainLossTooltip: Unrealised gain or loss on your current holdings: Market Value minus Cost Basis. Does not include realised gains from past sales or income received.
portfolioSummary.cagrTooltip: Compound Annual Growth Rate. Your annualised return based on Net Invested vs. current portfolio value, as if growth had been perfectly steady each year.
